emails.subject: Re: Two deals from 12-1-00
emails.body: Re: Two deals from 12-1-00 These two deals are with APB, not Amerex. I've changed them in the system. Thanks for the heads up. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 12/04/2000 07:47 AM

emails.subject: Two deals from 12-1-00
emails.body: Two deals from 12-1-00 Kate, Can you check with Sean Crandall on these two deals because Sean with Amerex says he did not do these deals with them. Deal 471842 Sell Avista 12/5-12/31 Mid-C 50 mw at $310.00 Deal 471841 Buy Powerex 12/5-12/31 Mid-C 50 mw at $310.00
